items.title_en: Evercore ISI pounds table on Sandisk. Bull case sees rally to $2,600
items.title_zh: Evercore ISI 在 Sandisk 上的排名表。牛市预计反弹至 2,600 美元
items.desc_en: Shares of Sandisk have already rallied nearly 300% this year. Evercore's bull case sees another 173% jump.
items.desc_zh: Sandisk 的股价今年已上涨近 300%。 Evercore 的牛市预测再次上涨 173%。

items.title_en: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
items.title_zh: 中国称美国封锁伊朗港口不负责任且危险
items.desc_en: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".
items.desc_zh: 中国是伊朗石油的最大买家，表示美国的海上封锁破坏了“本已脆弱的停火”。

items.title_en: A 'systemic' jet fuel shortage is brewing in Europe — and flights could be hit hard
items.title_zh: 欧洲正在酝酿“系统性”航空燃油短缺——航班可能受到严重打击
items.desc_en: 'We've seen constraints in countries like Vietnam and Thailand on air travel, but this is also spilling over to Europe,' an ING analyst told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: ING 分析师告诉 CNBC，“我们看到越南和泰国等国家的航空旅行受到限制，但这也蔓延到了欧洲。”

items.title_en: Trump says gas prices 'could be the same' or 'a little bit higher' by the midterms
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示中期选举时天然气价格“可能保持不变”或“略高”
items.desc_en: The U.S. began blocking ships through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, sending oil prices surging after peace talks failed over the weekend.
items.desc_zh: 美国周一开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡的船只，导致周末和平谈判失败后油价飙升。

items.title_en: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦官员称哈马斯拒绝加沙解除武装计划
items.desc_en: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.
items.desc_zh: 这位官员告诉英国广播公司，在以色列完全遵守其承诺之前，武装组织不会推进谈判。

items.title_en: Investor survey shows most bearishness in 11 months. So the contrarian call is to buy
items.title_zh: 投资者调查显示11个月以来最悲观情绪。所以逆势买入是买入
items.desc_en: The latest Global Fund Manager Survey from Bank of America shows sentiment fell to its most bearish reading since June 2025.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行最新的全球基金经理调查显示，市场情绪跌至 2025 年 6 月以来最悲观的水平。

items.title_en: S&P 500 continues higher a day after benchmark wipes out Iran war losses: Live updates
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数在基准消除伊朗战争损失后一天继续走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: Wall Street once again proved resilient in the face of increased geopolitical uncertainty.
items.desc_zh: 面对地缘政治不确定性增加，华尔街再次证明了其韧性。

items.title_en: Citigroup upgrades the U.S. stock market, citing 'eventual cessation' of U.S.-Iran war
items.title_zh: 花旗集团上调美国股市评级，称美伊战争“最终停止”
items.desc_en: The U.S. stock market is once again the place to be, it seems.
items.desc_zh: 美国股市似乎再次成为人们关注的焦点。

items.title_en: Lucid names auto industry outsider as CEO, expands Uber deal
items.title_zh: Lucid 任命汽车行业局外人为首席执行官，扩大 Uber 交易
items.desc_en: Lucid Group has named former chairman and CEO of Schindler Group, an industrial machinery manufacturer of escalators and elevators, as its new chief executive.
items.desc_zh: Lucid Group 任命自动扶梯和电梯工业机械制造商迅达集团 (Schindler Group) 前董事长兼首席执行官为其新任首席执行官。

items.title_en: Amazon to buy Globalstar to bolster Leo satellite business in deal worth about $11.6 billion
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将收购 Globalstar，以加强 Leo 卫星业务，交易价值约 116 亿美元
items.desc_en: Amazon said it would acquire Globalstar, giving its nascent satellite internet business a boost as it vies to compete with Elon Musk's SpaceX.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊表示将收购 Globalstar，从而推动其新兴的卫星互联网业务与埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 展开竞争。

items.title_en: Wholesale prices rose 0.5% in March, much less than expected despite war impact
items.title_zh: 尽管受到战争影响，3月份批发价格上涨0.5%，远低于预期
items.desc_en: The producer price index was expected to increase 1.1% in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识预测，3 月份生产者价格指数预计将上涨 1.1%。

items.title_en: Treasury Secretary Bessent now says it's OK for the Fed to wait to lower rates amid oil surge
items.title_zh: 财政部长贝森特现在表示，美联储可以在石油价格飙升的情况下等待降息
items.desc_en: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
items.desc_zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

items.title_en: Share of 7-year car loans grows as buyers 'work harder to make the numbers fit,' expert says
items.title_zh: 专家表示，随着买家“更加努力地使数字相符”，七年期汽车贷款的比例不断增加
items.desc_en: With the amount financed reaching an all-time high, more car buyers are stretching out their loans to at least seven years to afford the monthly payments.
items.desc_zh: 随着融资金额达到历史最高水平，越来越多的购车者将贷款期限延长至至少七年，以支付每月的还款额。

items.title_en: French woman, 86, held by ICE after moving to US to reunite with long-lost love
items.title_zh: 86岁法国女子移居美国与失散多年的爱人团聚后被ICE拘留
items.desc_en: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse told French media he is worried for his mother's frail health as she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.
items.desc_zh: 养老金领取者玛丽-泰雷兹的儿子告诉法国媒体，他担心母亲虚弱的健康状况，因为她被拘留在路易斯安那州的ICE中心。

items.title_en: BBC joins paramedics on duty in Lebanon after Israeli strikes
items.title_zh: 以色列袭击后，BBC 加入了黎巴嫩护理人员的行列
items.desc_en: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
items.desc_zh: BBC 中东记者雨果·巴切加 (Hugo Bachega) 与护理人员一起在纳巴蒂耶执勤，这座城市曾经充满活力，但现在已被遗弃。

items.title_en: Hungary's next PM would pick up if Putin calls and tell him to stop Ukraine war
items.title_zh: 如果普京打电话告诉匈牙利下一任总理停止乌克兰战争，他将会接电话
items.desc_en: Russia has offered "pragmatic" relations, but Péter Magyar says he will not call Vladimir Putin himself.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯提出了“务实”的关系，但彼得·马扎尔表示，他不会亲自致电弗拉基米尔·普京。

items.title_en: Spanish PM's wife charged with corruption after two-year probe
items.title_zh: 西班牙首相夫人经过两年调查被控腐败
items.desc_en: Begoña Gómez is accused of using her relationship with Pedro Sánchez to advance her private career.
items.desc_zh: 贝戈尼亚·戈麦斯被指控利用她与佩德罗·桑切斯的关系来推进她的私人事业。

items.title_en: Tuesday, April 14, 2026: Jim Cramer discusses his next moves for the Investing Club
items.title_zh: 2026 年 4 月 14 日星期二：吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 讨论他对投资俱乐部的下一步行动

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_zh: 特朗普因批评伊朗战争而攻击教皇

items.desc_zh: 美国总统指责利奥“在犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策方面糟糕”。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.title_en: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title_en: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
items.desc_en: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.
items.desc_zh: 该项目是承诺英国可能成为人工智能超级大国的一​​揽子技术投资的一部分。

items.title_en: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将终止对旧版 Kindle 的支持，引发用户强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.
items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。
